revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-130

No English Term

An opaque screen covering part of a lantern, or placed outside the lantern, so as to provide a sharp cut-off to a beam in a sector light and to reduce the angle of uncertainty.


Note: This is a particular form of "cut screen".

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Cut-off screen}}
